summary: Verified all 5 critical bug fixes for MyPropOps. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 bug fixes confirmed working via Playwright UI tests.

minor.issue: Shows 'Failed to load dashboard data' toast on first login - appears to be a timing/data issue, not a blocker

passed_tests: BUG FIX 1: /rentals page loads correctly without blue screen error - SelectItem value changed from '' to 'any'
BUG FIX 2: Contractor Portal dashboard has readable text with gray-orange gradient background
BUG FIX 3: Owner Portal login works with test credentials (owner@test.mypropops.com / TestOwner2026!)
BUG FIX 4: Mobile navigation shows links to Rentals, Tenants, and Owners portals
BUG FIX 5: Landing page has Portal Showcase section with all 4 portals (Tenant, Owner, Contractor, Browse Rentals)
Backend: /api/tenant-portal/login endpoint exists and returns proper responses
critical_code_review_comments: VacancyListings.js: SelectItem value correctly set to 'any' instead of empty string - this prevents the React Select error
ContractorDashboard.js: Background gradient changed from bright orange to subtle gray-orange (from-gray-50 to-orange-50) for better readability
Landing.js: Portal Showcase section properly added with all 4 portal cards (Tenant, Owner, Contractor, Browse Rentals)
Landing.js: Mobile navigation bar at bottom includes links to Rentals, Tenants, and Owners portals
server.py: /api/setup/create-test-owner endpoint correctly creates test owner account with properties assigned
seed_data_used: Test owner account created via /api/setup/create-test-owner endpoint

bug_fix_verification_summary.bug_1_rentals_page: ✅ FIXED - Page loads without blue screen error. Bedroom filter dropdown works correctly with 'any' as default value
bug_fix_verification_summary.bug_2_contractor_portal: ✅ FIXED - Dashboard has subtle gray-orange gradient background. Text is clearly readable
bug_fix_verification_summary.bug_3_owner_login: ✅ FIXED - Login works with test credentials. Dashboard loads and shows 'Welcome back, Test'
bug_fix_verification_summary.bug_4_mobile_nav: ✅ FIXED - Bottom navigation shows Features, Pricing, Rentals, Tenants, and Owners links
bug_fix_verification_summary.bug_5_portal_showcase: ✅ FIXED - Portal Showcase section displays all 4 portals with icons, descriptions, and access buttons

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 critical bug fixes have been verified. The app is working correctly. Test credentials for Owner Portal: owner@test.mypropops.com / TestOwner2026!. Test credentials for Contractor Portal: contractor@test.mypropops.com / TestContractor2026!. The /rentals page uses 'any' as default value for bedroom filter. Landing page has new Portal Showcase section between video carousel and infographic sections.
